about-me-description: I am an ambitious frontend developer with a passion for creating attractive and user-friendly web applications. With experience in HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and modern frameworks such as Angular, I strive to build innovative solutions that are both functional and visually appealing. My goal is to make a positive impact on the digital world through my work while continuously learning new technologies and expanding my skill set.
skills-description: This is an overview of my skills and the technologies I am familiar with. I have experience developing web applications using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Currently, I am learning modern frameworks such as Angular. In addition, I am always eager to expand my knowledge and learn new technologies.
skills-other-description: Just ask me! I am always eager to learn new technologies and expand my portfolio of skills. If you require a specific technology or skill, feel free to contact me and I will do my best to learn it and integrate it into your projects.
projects-description: Discover a selection of projects I created during my training at Developer Akademie.
recommendation-title: What My Colleagues Say About Me
recommendation-description-1: Working with him has always been a very pleasant experience. He actively contributes to the team, listens to others, and finds good solutions together with his colleagues. Even when facing challenges, he remains calm and focused on finding solutions.
recommendation-description-2: What impressed me most was his careful way of working. He works in a structured manner, pays attention to details, and delivers results where quality and clean implementation are the top priorities.
recommendation-description-3: He stands out through his high motivation and willingness to learn. He approaches new technologies and tasks with curiosity and adapts reliably to new topics.
contact-description: If you have any questions or are interested in working together, feel free to contact me.
contact-privacy: I have read the privacy policy and agree to the processing of my data as described.
error-email: Please enter a valid email address.
